description: A general template outlining metadata to be collected for biospecimen profiled in a dataset.

AltSampleID.description: An alternate identifier for a sample. With some assays there can be default or alternate sample identifiers entered into the data collection software. If you will be uploading data collected with an alternate identifier please provide that here. In some cases, the ARK BDM team will use this field to capture original but out-dated identifiers for samples.
AltSampleID.title: altSampleID

BiospecimenID.description: A unique identifier assigned to specimens collected from study participants. For multi-specimen data files provide all IDs in a comma-separated list.
BiospecimenID.title: biospecimenID

BiospecimenSubtype.description: Biospecimen status before sample is processed into a scRNA-seq library. Several scRNA-seq technologies support a variety of sample processing methods which can introduces sources of technical variation.
BiospecimenSubtype.title: biospecimenSubtype

BiospecimenType.description: A label indicating the biological material collected for experimentation and data collection. Where applicable, provide all types in a comma-separated list.
BiospecimenType.title: biospecimenType

CellOntologyID.description: Cell Ontology CL identifier that best describes a biopsecimen used to generate data, e.g., CL:0000084 for T cell.
CellOntologyID.title: cellOntologyID

CellType.description: The cell type name from Cell Ontology for the corresponding CL identifier.
CellType.title: cellType

Component.description: A high-level attribute for grouping attributes into templates.
Component.title: Component

FACSPopulation.description: A description of the marker gating strategy used to derive the population cells with FACS.
FACSPopulation.title: FACSPopulation

IndividualID.description: Unique identifier assigned to each study participant. For multi-specimen data files provide all IDs in a comma-separated list.
IndividualID.title: individualID

Notes.description: Please use this attribute to captured pertinent details not otherwise captured. This is an unstructured text entry, please be concise.
Notes.title: notes

ParentBiospecimenID.description: The biospecimenID associated with the originating biospecimen for derived or child biospecimens.
ParentBiospecimenID.title: parentBiospecimenID

Program.description: Name of the funding program that supported the generation of data and associated files
Program.title: program

Project.description: A sub-level attribute of `program` specifying a research initiative working to investigate particular hypotheses.
Project.title: project

SampleCollectionBatch.description: A label indicating batching of sample collection or experiment execution that occurs prior to data collection.
SampleCollectionBatch.title: sampleCollectionBatch

UserDefinedCellType.description: User-defined label of a cell type. Contributors are provided this option to use preferred or custom cell type labels that may vary from options and standards set by Cell Ontology.
UserDefinedCellType.title: userDefinedCellType

VisitID.description: Ordinal ID distinguishing different patient visits.
VisitID.title: visitID

title: BiospecimenMetadataTemplate
